full_text:
S248 pOme

This sample was used as a practice for Saun and Aditi so only culturing in 48 well plate was done. No flow cytometry / drug treatment was done

Saun performed tissue dissociation, and plating for half of the wells, remaining half was done by Aditi

Sample was dissociated in 5 ml of AdF++ containing Dispase and DNase according to the protocol.

Final pellet was resuspended in 1 ml of the culture medium

Cell count /ml

1). Total cells: 6.87 x 106 /mL

Live cells: 4.5 x 106 /mL

Viability: 65.5%

Average size: 7.9 um

2). Total cells: 4.4 x 106 /mL

Live cells: 2.43 x 106 /mL

Viability: 60.1%

Average size: 7.2 um

Average of two counts: 5.5 x 106 /mL

Total cell count: 5.5 x 106 / ml

A) Plating in 48 wells for DNA/RNA /scRNASeq:

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + SC: 18 wells x 40 µl x = 720 µl → round up to 750 uL

1000 cells/µl = 0.75 E6

→ make 21x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 750 µl each

→ 1000 cells/µl = 0.75 E6/tube=136 ul of final cell suspension

ORG full medium + cells → 579.5 µl

ome-gel      → 106 µl

aprotinin     → 2.5 µl

thrombin    → 2.3 µl

fibrinogen  → 15 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

E) Sample for cryo

4.5*E6 cells were frozen in stem cell banker X 1 vial

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
